title: Sync data hooks: useDaemonStatus, useSyncConflicts, useSyncForce, useConflictResolve, useConflictRetry, useSyncState, useSSEConnectionState
description:
Create TUI-side hook adapters for all daemon sync API endpoints. These hooks wrap the @codeplane/ui-core data layer for sync state and conflict management.

**Scope:**
- `useDaemonStatus()` → `GET /api/daemon/status` with 3-second polling, pause when screen not visible, resume on return. Returns `{ pid, uptime, sync_status, pending_count, conflict_count, last_sync_at, remote_url, error, isLoading, refetch }`.
- `useSyncConflicts()` → `GET /api/daemon/conflicts` with 3-second polling, cursor-based pagination (max 200 items), newest-first sort. Returns `PaginatedResult<SyncQueueItem>`.
- `useSyncForce()` → `POST /api/daemon/sync` with `isSyncing` guard flag, 30-second AbortSignal timeout. Returns `{ trigger, isSyncing, result, error }`.
- `useConflictResolve()` → `POST /api/daemon/conflicts/:id/resolve` with per-item-ID in-flight guard. Returns `{ resolve, isResolving(id), error }`.
- `useConflictRetry()` → `POST /api/daemon/conflicts/:id/retry` with per-item-ID in-flight guard. Returns `{ retry, isRetrying(id), error }`.
- `useSyncState()` → Derived state combining daemon status polling and SSE connection state. Returns `{ status, pendingCount, conflictCount, lastSyncAt, error }`. Maps: online/syncing/error+conflicts/error+noConflicts/offline to display states.
- `useSSEConnectionState()` → Consumes SSE provider context. Returns `{ connected, reconnecting, backoffMs }`.
- All hooks handle 401 (propagate to auth error), 404 (graceful removal), network errors (surface via error property), and 429 (rate limit flash).
- Immediate re-fetch after mutations (bypasses 3-second poll interval).
- Polling pauses when component unmounts and resumes on remount.

**Files:**
- `apps/tui/src/hooks/useDaemonStatus.ts`
- `apps/tui/src/hooks/useSyncConflicts.ts`
- `apps/tui/src/hooks/useSyncForce.ts`
- `apps/tui/src/hooks/useConflictResolve.ts`
- `apps/tui/src/hooks/useConflictRetry.ts`
- `apps/tui/src/hooks/useSyncState.ts`
- `apps/tui/src/hooks/useSSEConnectionState.ts`

**Dependencies:** @codeplane/ui-core data layer, SSEProvider context.

title: Toast and flash message system for sync screens
description:
Implement a transient message system used by sync force sync results, resolve action confirmations, and guard messages.

**Scope:**
- **Toast messages**: Rendered below the status banner as a `<box height={1} paddingX={1}>` with color-coded icon prefix (✓/⚠/✗). Auto-dismisses after configurable duration (default 5 seconds). Stacks: latest toast replaces previous. Supports success (green 34), warning (yellow 178), and error (red 196) variants.
- **Flash messages**: Transient status bar hint replacement for 2 seconds. Renders in `muted` italic. Used for guard messages ('Nothing to sync', 'Sync already in progress', 'Action in progress', 'Conflict already resolved', etc.). Returns to previous hint text after flash duration.
- **useToast() hook**: Returns `{ showToast(message, variant, duration?), dismissToast(), activeToast }`. Manages timer cleanup on unmount.
- **useFlash() hook**: Returns `{ showFlash(message, duration?), activeFlash }`. Integrates with status bar hint system.
- Both systems handle terminal resize (re-render at new width), are responsive (abbreviate at 80×24), and clean up timers on unmount.
- Toast renders at zIndex 5, positioned below status banner.
- Flash messages max 40 characters; toast messages max 80 characters at minimum width.

**Files:**
- `apps/tui/src/components/Toast.tsx`
- `apps/tui/src/components/Flash.tsx`
- `apps/tui/src/hooks/useToast.ts`
- `apps/tui/src/hooks/useFlash.ts`

**Dependencies:** StatusBar component, ThemeProvider.

title: Error detail modal component for sync conflict/failed items
description:
Build the error detail modal overlay used by both the Sync Status screen and Conflict List for inspecting sync queue items.

**Scope:**
- Centered modal overlay with `error`-color border (red 196). Responsive sizing: 90%×80% (80×24), 60%×60% (120×40), 50%×50% (200×60).
- Content sections: title bar 'Conflict Detail' + 'Esc:close', metadata fields (status with color badge, method in primary bold, API path, local ID if present, absolute timestamp with relative), error message in `<scrollbox>`, request body preview in `<scrollbox>` with `<code language="json">` for syntax highlighting.
- Body truncated at 2000 characters with '… (truncated)' marker. Null body shows 'No request body' placeholder.
- Scrollable content via j/k when content overflows.
- Contextual action hints at bottom: `d: discard` for conflict items, `y: retry` for conflict/failed items, `Esc: close` always.
- `d` key from within modal opens stacked discard confirmation (zIndex 20 over zIndex 10).
- `y` key from within modal fires retry and auto-closes modal on success.
- `Esc` closes modal, returns focus to queue list.
- ANSI escape codes in error messages are stripped before display.
- Resize recalculates modal dimensions; scroll position preserved.
- zIndex 10 (below confirmation modal at 20).

**Files:**
- `apps/tui/src/components/SyncErrorDetailModal.tsx`

**Dependencies:** Modal system, code component, theme tokens.

title: Discard confirmation modal for sync conflict resolution
description:
Build the discard confirmation modal overlay for destructive sync conflict discard actions.

**Scope:**
- Centered modal overlay with red `border='single'` indicating destructive action. Responsive sizing: 90% (80×24), 50% (120×40), 40% (200×60). Height: 7 rows.
- Content: title 'Discard Conflict?' in bold warning color, operation summary (method in primary bold + API path), error preview in error color, relative timestamp, warning text in muted ('This action is permanent and cannot be undone.'), action hints (`Enter: confirm discard` in error bold, `Esc: cancel` in muted).
- `Enter` confirms the discard action. `Esc` cancels and dismisses.
- Focus trapped: only `Enter`, `Esc`, and `Ctrl+C` active.
- zIndex 20 (above error detail modal at 10).
- Error message in confirmation modal: max 500ch inline, longer content wrapped.
- API path: full display, wraps if exceeds width.
- Local ID: 12ch max with `…` truncation.
- Minimum modal width: 40 cols.
- Rapid `d`+`Enter` (<50ms): modal must render before `Enter` is accepted.

**Files:**
- `apps/tui/src/components/SyncDiscardConfirmModal.tsx`

**Dependencies:** Modal system, theme tokens.

title: Scaffold Sync screen directory, register in screen router, wire go-to and command palette
description:
Create the Sync screen entry in the screen registry and wire all navigation paths.

**Scope:**
- Register `Sync` screen in `apps/tui/src/router/screens.ts` with `requiresRepo: false`.
- Create `apps/tui/src/screens/Sync/` directory structure with `index.tsx` entry point.
- Wire `g y` go-to keybinding to push Sync screen (no repo context required).
- Register `:sync` command palette entry.
- Support `--screen sync` deep-link launch argument (pre-populates stack: [Dashboard, Sync]).
- Register `:sync conflicts` command palette entry for conflict list sub-view.
- Support `--screen sync-conflicts` deep-link.
- Wire `g y c` go-to sequence for conflict list.
- Breadcrumb: 'Dashboard > Sync Status' for main screen, 'Dashboard > Sync Status > Conflicts' for conflict list.
- Export placeholder components that render screen name.

**Files:**
- `apps/tui/src/screens/Sync/index.tsx`
- `apps/tui/src/screens/Sync/SyncStatusScreen.tsx` (placeholder)
- `apps/tui/src/screens/Sync/SyncConflictList.tsx` (placeholder)
- Updates to `apps/tui/src/router/screens.ts`

**Dependencies:** Screen router, command palette, go-to keybindings.

title: Wiki data hooks: useWikiPages, useWikiPage, useWikiDelete, useWikiCreate, useWikiUpdate
description:
Create TUI-side hook adapters for all wiki API endpoints.

**Scope:**
- `useWikiPages(owner, repo, options?)` → `GET /api/repos/:owner/:repo/wiki?page=N&per_page=30&q=...` with page-based pagination (not cursor-based). Returns `{ pages, totalCount, isLoading, error, hasMore, fetchMore, refetch }`. Extracts `X-Total-Count` from response header. Supports `q` query parameter for server-side search. 500-item memory cap.
- `useWikiPage(owner, repo, slug)` → `GET /api/repos/:owner/:repo/wiki/:slug`. Returns `{ page, isLoading, error, refetch }`. 30-second client-side cache.
- `useWikiDelete(owner, repo)` → `DELETE /api/repos/:owner/:repo/wiki/:slug`. Optimistic removal from list. Returns `{ deletePage, isDeleting, error }`. Handles 403 (permission denied), 404 (already deleted).
- `useWikiCreate(owner, repo)` → `POST /api/repos/:owner/:repo/wiki`. Returns `{ createPage, isCreating, error }`.
- `useWikiUpdate(owner, repo, slug)` → `PUT /api/repos/:owner/:repo/wiki/:slug`. Returns `{ updatePage, isUpdating, error }`.
- All hooks handle 401 (auth error screen), 429 (rate limit flash), network timeout (30s), and server errors.
- Page-based pagination: tracks current page number, computes hasMore from totalCount vs loaded items.
- Search integration: when `q` parameter changes, reset to page 1, cancel in-flight requests.

**Files:**
- `apps/tui/src/hooks/useWikiPages.ts`
- `apps/tui/src/hooks/useWikiPage.ts`
- `apps/tui/src/hooks/useWikiDelete.ts`
- `apps/tui/src/hooks/useWikiCreate.ts`
- `apps/tui/src/hooks/useWikiUpdate.ts`

**Dependencies:** @codeplane/ui-core API client, auth provider.

title: HighlightedText component for wiki search result match highlighting
description:
Build a reusable HighlightedText component that renders text with case-insensitive query match segments highlighted in accent color.

**Scope:**
- `<HighlightedText text={string} query={string} color={number} mutedColor={number} maxWidth={number} />` component.
- Performs case-insensitive search for all non-overlapping occurrences of `query` within `text`.
- Matching segments render in `primary` color (ANSI 33) with bold attribute.
- Non-matching segments render in the component's default color (default text or `muted` for slugs).
- Supports grapheme-aware truncation: if text exceeds `maxWidth`, truncate with `…` respecting grapheme cluster boundaries.
- Highlighting respects truncation: only visible portions are highlighted.
- Handles edge cases: empty query (no highlighting), query longer than text, overlapping matches, Unicode/emoji in text and query.
- Pure render component — no state, no hooks, no side effects. Memoized.

**Files:**
- `apps/tui/src/components/HighlightedText.tsx`

**Dependencies:** Theme tokens.

title: Scaffold Wiki screen directory, register in screen router, wire go-to and command palette
description:
Create the Wiki screen entries in the screen registry and wire all navigation paths.

**Scope:**
- Register `Wiki` screen in `apps/tui/src/router/screens.ts` with `requiresRepo: true`.
- Register `WikiDetail` screen with `requiresRepo: true`, params: `{ slug: string }`.
- Register `WikiCreate` screen with `requiresRepo: true`.
- Create `apps/tui/src/screens/Wiki/` directory structure.
- Wire `g k` go-to keybinding to push Wiki screen (requires repo context; if no repo active, prompt for repo selection).
- Register `:wiki` command palette entry.
- Register `:wiki <slug>` command palette entry for direct page navigation.
- Support `--screen wiki --repo owner/repo` deep-link (stack: [Dashboard, RepoOverview, Wiki]).
- Support `--screen wiki --repo owner/repo --slug <slug>` deep-link (stack: [Dashboard, RepoOverview, Wiki, WikiDetail]).
- Breadcrumbs: 'Dashboard > owner/repo > Wiki' for list, 'Dashboard > owner/repo > Wiki > <title>' for detail.
- Export placeholder components.

**Files:**

- Updates to `apps/tui/src/router/screens.ts`

**Dependencies:** Screen router, command palette, go-to keybindings.

title: Sync status indicator component in global status bar
description:
Implement the always-visible sync health indicator in the center section of the global status bar.

**Scope (from spec TUI_SYNC_STATUS_INDICATOR):**

**Four visual states:**
- Connected (online): Green dot `●` (U+25CF) + 'Connected' in success color (ANSI 34)
- Syncing: Braille spinner (⠋⠙⠹⠸⠼⠴⠦⠧⠇⠏) at 100ms/frame via `useTimeline()` + 'Syncing…' in warning color (ANSI 178)
- Conflicts: Yellow triangle `▲` (U+25B2) + '{N} conflict(s)' in warning color (ANSI 178). Singular for 1, capped at '99+ conflicts'
- Disconnected: Red dot `●` + 'Disconnected' + optional '(retry {N}s)' backoff in error color (ANSI 196)

**State mapping:**
- `SyncStatus.online` → Connected
- `SyncStatus.syncing` → Syncing
- `SyncStatus.error` + `conflictCount > 0` → Conflict
- `SyncStatus.error` + `conflictCount === 0` → Disconnected
- `SyncStatus.offline` / null / undefined → Disconnected
- SSE `connected === false` acts as leading indicator → Disconnected

**Responsive:**
- 80–119 cols: Icon only (1 character)
- 120–199 cols: Icon + label
- 200+ cols: Icon + label + ' · {relative_time}' (timestamp updates every 10s)

**Non-UTF-8 fallback:** `●` → `*`, `▲` → `!`, braille → `- \ | /`, `·` → `-`

**Performance:** < 1ms render, memoized, no allocations on spinner frames. Spinner timer inactive when not syncing.

**Data hooks:** `useSyncState()`, `useSSEConnectionState()`, `useTerminalDimensions()`, `useTimeline()`

**Integration:** Embedded in StatusBar center section with `flexShrink={0}`. No keyboard focus, no keybindings. Passive read-only display.

**Tests:** 49 tests in `e2e/tui/sync.test.ts` (SNAP-SI-001–016, KEY-SI-001–006, RESIZE-SI-001–007, RT-SI-001–009, EDGE-SI-001–011).

**Files:**
- `apps/tui/src/components/SyncStatusIndicator.tsx`
- `apps/tui/src/components/SyncStatusIndicator.test.tsx` (unit tests if appropriate)
- `e2e/tui/sync.test.ts` (indicator test section)
- Updates to `apps/tui/src/components/StatusBar.tsx` to embed indicator in center section

title: Sync status screen: dashboard with status banner, queue summary, connection details, and scrollable queue list
description:
Implement the central sync status dashboard screen.

**Scope (from spec TUI_SYNC_STATUS_SCREEN):**

**Layout:**
- Status banner (1–2 rows): color-coded sync state indicator (● Online/◐ Syncing…/● Error/● Offline), remote URL (truncated), daemon uptime, last sync timestamp
- Two-section panel: Sync queue summary (pending/synced/conflict/failed counts with color badges) | Connection details (PID, port, DB mode, remote URL, token mask)
- Scrollable queue list: status badge, HTTP method, API path, local ID, error preview, timestamp. Newest-first, max 200 items.

**Keyboard bindings:**
- j/k/arrows: navigate queue items
- Enter: show error detail modal (conflict/failed only)
- d: discard conflict (opens confirmation modal)
- y: retry failed/conflict item (immediate, optimistic)
- S: force sync all pending
- /: focus filter input (filters by method, path, status)
- Esc: close modal → clear filter → pop (priority chain)
- G/gg: jump to end/start
- Ctrl+D/U: page down/up
- r: refresh immediately (bypass poll)
- q: pop screen

**Data polling:** 3-second interval via `useDaemonStatus()` and `useSyncConflicts()`. Pauses when screen not visible.

**Responsive:** 80×24 single-column condensed; 120×40 two-column with all queue columns; 200×60 generous spacing.

**Empty states:** 'No sync queue items.' centered. 'All clear — no pending items' in green. 'Daemon not running' with CLI hint.

**Error handling:** Daemon unreachable message, auth error propagation, network timeout with retry hint.

**Tests:** 111 tests in `e2e/tui/sync.test.ts` (SNAP-SYNC-001–028, KEY-SYNC-001–035, RESP-SYNC-001–012, INT-SYNC-001–022, EDGE-SYNC-001–014).

**Files:**
- `apps/tui/src/screens/Sync/SyncStatusScreen.tsx`
- `apps/tui/src/screens/Sync/components/StatusBanner.tsx`
- `apps/tui/src/screens/Sync/components/SyncQueueSummary.tsx`
- `apps/tui/src/screens/Sync/components/ConnectionDetails.tsx`
- `apps/tui/src/screens/Sync/components/QueueItemRow.tsx`
- `apps/tui/src/screens/Sync/components/QueueFilter.tsx`
- `e2e/tui/sync.test.ts`

title: Sync conflict list: focused triage view with bulk actions, resource description parsing, and composable filters
description:
Implement the dedicated conflict triage surface.

**Scope (from spec TUI_SYNC_CONFLICT_LIST):**

**Differences from sync status screen:**
- Shows only conflict/failed items (not pending/synced)
- Resource description parsing from API paths (e.g., `/api/repos/acme/widgets/issues` → 'Issue on acme/widgets')
- Additional keybindings: X (bulk discard all visible), A (bulk retry all visible), f (cycle status filter: all/conflict/failed), m (cycle method filter, standard+ only)
- Summary bar: 'Sync Conflicts (N)' in red, or 'No Conflicts — All Clear ✓' in green
- Bulk confirmation modals with count and progress
- Composable client-side filters (status × method × search text)

**Reachable via:** `Enter` on conflict count in Sync Status, `g y c`, `:sync conflicts`, `--screen sync-conflicts`

**Breadcrumb:** 'Dashboard > Sync Status > Conflicts'

**Column layout responsive:** 80×24 abbreviated (CON/FAL), 120×40 full labels + error preview, 200×60 full API path column

**Bulk operations:** Sequential execution (not parallel). Bulk discard shows progress. Partial failure: completed items removed, failed remain.

**Overlays:** Conflict detail modal, discard confirmation, bulk discard confirmation (count + warning), bulk retry confirmation

**Data hooks:** `useSyncConflicts()`, `useDaemonStatus()`, `useConflictResolve()`, `useConflictRetry()` — all polled at 3s

**Tests:** 115 tests in `e2e/tui/sync.test.ts` (SNAP-CL-001–024, KEY-CL-001–038, RESP-CL-001–017, INT-CL-001–020, EDGE-CL-001–016).

**Files:**
- `apps/tui/src/screens/Sync/SyncConflictList.tsx`
- `apps/tui/src/screens/Sync/components/ConflictRow.tsx`
- `apps/tui/src/screens/Sync/components/ConflictSummaryBar.tsx`
- `apps/tui/src/screens/Sync/components/FilterToolbar.tsx`
- `apps/tui/src/screens/Sync/components/BulkConfirmModal.tsx`
- `apps/tui/src/screens/Sync/utils/parseResourceDescription.ts`
- `e2e/tui/sync.test.ts`

title: Sync resolve actions: discard and retry with optimistic UI, in-flight guards, focus management, and contextual hints
description:
Implement the full discard and retry interaction model for sync conflict resolution.

**Scope (from spec TUI_SYNC_RESOLVE_ACTION):**

**Discard flow:**
- `d` on conflict row → confirmation modal → `Enter` confirms → `POST /api/daemon/conflicts/:id/resolve` → optimistic row removal → flash 'Conflict discarded' → re-fetch counts
- `d` on non-conflict: no-op
- From error detail modal: `d` opens stacked confirmation (zIndex 20 over 10)
- 404 response: row silently removed, flash 'Conflict already resolved'
- 500/network error: optimistic revert (row reappears), error flash

**Retry flow:**
- `y` on conflict/failed row → immediate `POST /api/daemon/conflicts/:id/retry` → optimistic status badge change to yellow 'pending' → flash 'Item queued for retry'
- No confirmation needed (non-destructive)
- From error detail modal: `y` fires retry and auto-closes modal
- 404 response: row removed, flash 'Item no longer in queue'
- 500/network error: optimistic revert, error flash

**In-flight guards:** Client-side per-item-ID guard prevents duplicate API calls. 'Action in progress' flash on repeated presses. 30-second timeout.

**Focus management:** After discard: advance to next → previous → empty state. After retry: stay on same item.

**Contextual status bar hints:** Conflict rows: 'd:discard y:retry Enter:detail'. Failed rows: 'y:retry Enter:detail'. Pending/synced: no resolve hints.

**Polling merge:** Polling continues during actions; poll results merge with optimistic state (discarded items hidden, retried items keep pending).

**Tests:** 84 tests in `e2e/tui/sync.test.ts` (SNAP-RESOLVE-001–018, KEY-RESOLVE-001–024, RESP-RESOLVE-001–008, INT-RESOLVE-001–020, EDGE-RESOLVE-001–014).

**Note:** This feature implements the action logic used by both the Sync Status screen and Conflict List screen. The resolve/retry hooks and UI patterns are shared.

**Files:**
- `apps/tui/src/screens/Sync/hooks/useResolveAction.ts`
- `apps/tui/src/screens/Sync/hooks/useRetryAction.ts`
- `apps/tui/src/screens/Sync/hooks/useInFlightGuard.ts`
- Updates to SyncStatusScreen.tsx and SyncConflictList.tsx
- `e2e/tui/sync.test.ts`

title: Force sync action: S key trigger with syncing state, braille spinner, result toast, guard messages, and post-sync refresh
description:
Implement the keyboard-driven force sync action on the Sync Status screen.

**Scope (from spec TUI_SYNC_FORCE_SYNC):**

**Trigger:** `S` (Shift+S) on Sync Status screen. Also works from error detail modal.

**Guards:**
- `isSyncing === true`: flash 'Sync already in progress' (2s)
- `pendingCount === 0`: flash 'Nothing to sync' (2s)
- Filter input focused: no-op (S captured as text)

**Syncing state:**
- Status banner: `◐ Syncing…` with braille spinner at 80ms/frame via `useTimeline()`
- Progress hint (standard+): 'Flushing N pending items…' in muted
- `S:sync` hint in status bar replaced with 'syncing…'
- All other keybindings remain functional during sync

**Result toast (5 seconds):**
- Success: '✓ Synced N items (0 conflicts, 0 failed)' in green (ANSI 34)
- Warning: '⚠ Synced N items (X conflicts, 0 failed)' in yellow (ANSI 178)
- Error: '✗ Synced N items (X conflicts, Y failed)' in red (ANSI 196)
- Abbreviated at 80×24: 'Synced N (X conf, Y fail)'
- Singular: 'Synced 1 item'

**Error toasts:** Timeout ('Sync timed out. Press S to retry.'), no remote, daemon not running, rate limited (429), network error, server error

**Post-sync refresh:** Immediate re-fetch of `useDaemonStatus()` and `useSyncConflicts()` bypassing 3-second poll.

**Lifecycle:** `isSyncing` flag cleared on success, error, AND timeout — never permanently set. Navigate away during sync: sync continues server-side, no toast shown.

**30-second AbortSignal timeout.** Rapid S presses: first triggers, rest show guard flash.

**Tests:** 62 tests in `e2e/tui/sync.test.ts` (SNAP-FORCE-001–012, KEY-FORCE-001–018, RESP-FORCE-001–006, INT-FORCE-001–016, EDGE-FORCE-001–010).

**Files:**
- `apps/tui/src/screens/Sync/hooks/useForceSyncAction.ts`
- Updates to SyncStatusScreen.tsx (syncing state in banner, S keybinding)
- `e2e/tui/sync.test.ts`

title: Wiki list screen: page list with responsive columns, pagination, inline delete, and search toolbar
description:
Implement the primary wiki browsing surface.

**Scope (from spec TUI_WIKI_LIST_SCREEN):**

**Layout:**
- Title row: 'Wiki (N)' in bold primary, where N is `X-Total-Count`
- Persistent search toolbar below title with `<input>` placeholder 'Search wiki…'
- Scrollable list of wiki page rows sorted by `updated_at` descending
- Each row: title, slug (`/`-prefixed, muted), author (muted), relative timestamp (muted)
- Focused row: reverse video with primary accent (ANSI 33)

**Responsive columns:**
- 80×24: Title (remaining) + timestamp (4ch). Slug/author hidden.
- 120×40: Title (45ch) + slug (25ch) + author (12ch) + timestamp (4ch)
- 200×60: Title (70ch) + slug (35ch) + author (15ch) + timestamp (4ch)

**Keyboard:**
- j/k/arrows: navigate rows
- Enter: push wiki detail view with correct repo and slug
- /: focus search input
- Esc: clear search → pop (priority chain)
- G/gg: jump to end/start
- Ctrl+D/U: page down/up
- R: retry (error state only)
- c: push wiki create form
- d: inline delete confirmation ('Delete <Title>? y/n' in warning color)
- y: confirm delete (optimistic removal)
- n: cancel delete
- q: pop screen

**Pagination:** Page-based (page/per_page), 30 items default. Next page at 80% scroll. 500-item memory cap with footer message.

**Delete:** Optimistic removal, decrement total count. 403 → revert + 'Permission denied'. 404 → remove + 'Page not found' flash. Only one confirmation active at a time.

**Empty states:** 'No wiki pages yet. Press c to create one.' or 'No wiki pages match your search.'

**Edge cases:** Unicode grapheme-aware truncation, null author → 'unknown', terminal resize preserves focus.

**Tests:** 105 tests in `e2e/tui/wiki.test.ts` (SNAP-WIKI-001–022, KEY-WIKI-001–038, RESP-WIKI-001–014, INT-WIKI-001–018, EDGE-WIKI-001–013).

**Files:**
- `apps/tui/src/screens/Wiki/WikiListScreen.tsx`
- `apps/tui/src/screens/Wiki/components/WikiPageRow.tsx`
- `apps/tui/src/screens/Wiki/components/WikiToolbar.tsx`
- `apps/tui/src/screens/Wiki/components/InlineDeleteConfirm.tsx`
- `e2e/tui/wiki.test.ts`

title: Wiki detail view: markdown rendering, page navigation, edit form, delete action, and responsive metadata
description:
Implement the wiki page detail screen with full markdown rendering.

**Scope (from spec TUI_WIKI_DETAIL_VIEW):**

**Layout:**
- Page header: title in bold (wraps, never truncated), slug in muted `/<slug>` (hidden at 80×24)
- Metadata row: `@username` in primary (ANSI 33), 'created {time}' in muted, 'updated {time}' in muted (hidden when same as created, hidden at 80×24)
- Separator: horizontal rule
- Body: `<markdown>` component in `<scrollbox>`. Empty body: 'This page has no content.' in muted italic. Body capped at 100,000 chars with truncation notice.

**Keyboard:**
- j/k/arrows: scroll content
- G/gg: jump to bottom/top
- Ctrl+D/U: page down/up
- ]: next wiki page in list order
- [: previous wiki page in list order ('Last page'/'First page' indicator if at boundary)
- e: open edit form (title, slug, body textarea, Tab/Shift+Tab between fields, Ctrl+S submit, Esc cancel with dirty check)
- d: delete with confirmation dialog ('Delete wiki page <title>? This cannot be undone. [y/n]')
- q: pop back to wiki list

**Edit form:** Three fields (title input, slug input, body textarea). Pre-populated. Slug validation (lowercase alphanumeric + hyphens). Title required. Esc with changes → 'Discard changes? [y/n]'. Success refreshes detail. Failure shows inline error.

**Delete:** Confirmation → DELETE request → pop to list on success. Failure shows inline error in dialog.

**Data:** `useWikiPage(owner, repo, slug)` with 30-second cache. 404 → 'Wiki page not found' with 'Press q to go back'. Network error → 'Failed to load wiki page' with 'Press R to retry'.

**Responsive:** 80×24 compact (slug hidden, author only + compact time). 120×40 standard (full metadata). 200×60 expanded (wider content, full timestamps).

**Breadcrumb:** '… > Wiki > <page-title>' (title truncated to 30ch)

**Files:**
- `apps/tui/src/screens/Wiki/WikiDetailView.tsx`
- `apps/tui/src/screens/Wiki/components/WikiPageHeader.tsx`
- `apps/tui/src/screens/Wiki/components/WikiEditForm.tsx`
- `apps/tui/src/screens/Wiki/components/WikiDeleteConfirm.tsx`
- `e2e/tui/wiki.test.ts`

title: Wiki search: server-side full-text search with debounce, match highlighting, count badge, and state preservation
description:
Implement the server-side search integration within the wiki list screen.

**Scope (from spec TUI_WIKI_SEARCH):**

**Search activation:** `/` focuses search input. Input has `/ ` prefix indicator in muted, placeholder 'Search wiki pages…'.

**Search behavior:** 300ms debounce. Server-side via `GET /api/repos/:owner/:repo/wiki?q={query}&page=1&per_page=30`. Results ranked by relevance (server-side). Empty/whitespace query → no request, show full list.

**Match highlighting:** HighlightedText component renders matching segments in primary color (ANSI 33) bold in both titles and slugs. Case-insensitive. Respects truncation boundaries.

**Match count badge:** Right of search input. 'N results' (muted), '1 result' (singular), 'No results' (warning). From `X-Total-Count` header.

**Keyboard in search input:**
- Printable chars: append to query (including j/k/q/c/d/G/g which DO NOT trigger list actions)
- Backspace: delete last char
- Ctrl+U: clear query (stay in input)
- Ctrl+W: delete last word
- Enter: submit immediately (cancel debounce), close input, focus first result
- Esc (query non-empty): clear, re-fetch unfiltered
- Esc (empty, previous search active): clear active search
- Esc (empty, no previous search): pop screen
- /: types literal `/`

**Pagination with search:** Same page-based pagination. Query parameter preserved. 500-item cap.

**State preservation:** Preserved on navigate to detail and back. Cleared on exit wiki screen. `/` re-opens with previous query.

**Header count:** Updates to reflect search results: 'Wiki (3)' during active search.

**Empty results:** 'No wiki pages match <query>' centered with 'Press Esc to clear search'.

**Search input:** Max 120 chars (additional silently ignored). Horizontal scroll for long queries.

**Error handling:** 500/429/timeout: previous list preserved, inline error 3s. No auto-retry on 429.

**Responsive:** 80×24 full width input, match count hidden if overlaps. 120×40 70% width, count visible. 200×60 60% width.

**Tests:** 91 tests in `e2e/tui/wiki.test.ts` (SNAP-WIKI-SEARCH-001–016, KEY-WIKI-SEARCH-001–030, RESIZE-WIKI-SEARCH-001–011, INT-WIKI-SEARCH-001–020, EDGE-WIKI-SEARCH-001–014).

**Files:**
- `apps/tui/src/screens/Wiki/components/WikiSearchInput.tsx`
- `apps/tui/src/screens/Wiki/hooks/useWikiSearch.ts`
- Updates to WikiListScreen.tsx and WikiToolbar.tsx
- `e2e/tui/wiki.test.ts`
